query: SELECT a.id, a.orderNumber, a.totalAmount, a.storeName, SUBSTRING(a.imageUrl, 1, 50) as log_img, a.aiDecision, r.totalAmount as r_amt, r.storeName as r_store, SUBSTRING(r.imageUrl, 1, 50) as r_img, r.pointsAwarded as r_pts FROM ai_auto_review_logs a LEFT JOIN line_receipts r ON a.receiptId = r.id WHERE a.isDryRun = 0 ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT a.id, a.orderNumber, a.totalAmount, a.storeName, SUBSTRING(a.imageUrl, 1, 50) as log_img, a.aiDecision, r.totalAmount as r_amt, r.storeName as r_store, SUBSTRING(r.imageUrl, 1, 50) as r_img, r.pointsAwarded as r_pts FROM ai_auto_review_logs a LEFT JOIN line_receipts r ON a.receiptId = r.id WHERE a.isDryRun = 0 ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT 5;
